TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = R'uyan = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang R'uyan. 92 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 237 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 89% niqan 212 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 11% niqan 25 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal82%, Amis4%, Bunun2%, Saysiyat1%. Hangan alang Hangan alang alang Pay-ran(R'uyan) Thuyang alang Pnseanak alang: " Ryaw-wu-yeyn" mririh saw egu qnpringan rqnux. Nniqan alang Nniqan Sin-cu-seyn Wu-fung-syang Taw-san-cun. Klbangan Llbangan ga daya Cing-cyueyn, igi siyaw daya Sang-ping-si, Ga hraan hidaw Wu-cwey-san. Kndkilan lnglingay Nniqan llingay Dxgal sttuan, knbaraw 1000-1500m. Kklaan ppanan Pgkla ppanan rulu. Mgriq rulu: Tduwa muda Seng-taw 122(Nan-cing kung-ru), paah Cu-tung mkala dgiyaq mtmay Wu-fung, muuda Maw-pu doniqan kingal wayay elug mquri elug ppanan pnegalang Pay-ran, mtmay do dhuq Pay-ran da. Ida tduwa mniq brah mmowsa alang Cing-cyueyn siida niqan tru elug wayay, mqurielug Pay-ran do dhuq da. Mlutuc syusan teync Mlutuc teyn-c ti-tu. Nniqan seejiq alang Klgan seejiq alang. Skari kari Skari kari:kari Atayal, kari Tlu. Snhiyaan Snhiyan cung-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pnyahan alang Kari Atayal ga Ryaw-Wu-yeyn ksun o " Egu qnpringan rqnux".Babaw klwaan Tanah Tunux do, keysacu Tanah Tunux ga, phiyug sapah ptasan ni ciway sapah pyasan kska alang, duri ni, thjilan kingal alang kana ka gisu kghak mniq kneinu na Atayal, saw nii pslian mrahul ga kari Atayal o "Tu-nan" ksun. Kiya ni manu ka Tanah Tunux o bqanan dha suyang bhangan "Pay-ran" da.Kiya ka kiya ni tnealang o bqanan dha hnang "Pas-qu-nan" (paskwalan), bukuy kwan-fu do djyan dhuq sayang ka Pay-ran ksun. Kklaan rrigaw pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang. Pnyahan bnatas Qtaan bnatas
S.PHON: = …ĺ'ujan = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč …ĺ'ujan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, bunun*%, sajsijat*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč paj-…ĺan(…ĺ'ujan) tńßujaŇč alaŇč pns…ôanak alaŇč: " …ĺjaw-wu-j…ôn" m…ĺi…ĺińß saw …ôgu qnp…ĺiŇčan …ĺqnux. nniqan alaŇč nniqan sin- ¶u-s…ôn wu-*uŇč-sjaŇč taw-san- ¶un. klbaŇčan llbaŇčan ga daja ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn, igi sijaw daja saŇč-piŇč-si, ga ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw wu- ¶w…ô-san. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj nniqan lliŇčaj dxgal sttuan, knba…ĺaw ****-****m. kklaan ppanan pgkla ppanan …ĺulu. mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: tduwa muda s…ôŇč-taw ***(nan- ¶iŇč kuŇč-…ĺu), paańß ¶u-tuŇč mkala dgijaq mtmaj wu-*uŇč, muuda maw-pu doniqan kiŇčal wajaj …ôlug mqu…ĺi …ôlug ppanan pn…ôgalaŇč paj-…ĺan, mtmaj do dńßuq paj-…ĺan da. ida tduwa mniq b…ĺańß mmowsa alaŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn siida niqan t…ĺu …ôlug wajaj, mqu…ĺi…ôlug paj-…ĺan do dńßuq da. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn ¶ mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu. nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ska…ĺi ka…ĺi:ka…ĺi atajal, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijaan snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pnjańßan alaŇč ka…ĺi atajal ga …ĺjaw-wu-j…ôn ksun o " …ôgu qnp…ĺiŇčan …ĺqnux".babaw klwaan tanańß tunux do, k…ôsa ¶u tanańß tunux ga, pńßijug sapańß ptasan ni ¶iwaj sapańß pjasan kska alaŇč, du…ĺi ni, tńß…üilan kiŇčal alaŇč kana ka gisu kgńßak mniq kn…ôinu na atajal, saw nii pslian m…ĺańßul ga ka…ĺi atajal o "tu-nan" ksun. kija ni manu ka tanańß tunux o bqanan dńßa sujaŇč bńßaŇčan "paj-…ĺan" da.kija ka kija ni tn…ôalaŇč o bqanan dńßa ńßnaŇč "pas-qu-nan" (paskwalan), bukuj kwan-*u do d…üjan dńßuq sajaŇč ka paj-…ĺan ksun. kklaan …ĺ…ĺigaw pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč. pnjańßan bnatas qtaan bnatas
S.FORM: = R'uyan = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang R'uyan. 92 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 237 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 89% niqan 212 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 11% niqan 25 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal82%, Amis4%, Bunun2%, Saysiyat1%. Hangan alang Hangan alang alang Pay-ran(R'uyan) Thuyang alang Pnseanak alang: " Ryaw-wu-yeyn" mririh saw egu qnpringan rqnux. Nniqan alang Nniqan Sin-cu-seyn Wu-fung-syang Taw-san-cun. Klbangan Llbangan ga daya Cing-cyueyn, igi siyaw daya Sang-ping-si, Ga hraan hidaw Wu-cwey-san. Kndkilan lnglingay Nniqan llingay Dxgal sttuan, knbaraw 1000-1500m. Kklaan ppanan Pgkla ppanan rulu. Mgriq rulu: Tduwa muda Seng-taw 122(Nan-cing kung-ru), paah Cu-tung mkala dgiyaq mtmay Wu-fung, muuda Maw-pu doniqan kingal wayay elug mquri elug ppanan pnegalang Pay-ran, mtmay do dhuq Pay-ran da. Ida tduwa mniq brah mmowsa alang Cing-cyueyn siida niqan tru elug wayay, mqurielug Pay-ran do dhuq da. Mlutuc syusan teync Mlutuc teyn-c ti-tu. Nniqan seejiq alang Klgan seejiq alang. Skari kari Skari kari:kari Atayal, kari Tlu. Snhiyaan Snhiyan cung-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pnyahan alang Kari Atayal ga Ryaw-Wu-yeyn ksun o " Egu qnpringan rqnux".Babaw klwaan Tanah Tunux do, keysacu Tanah Tunux ga, phiyug sapah ptasan ni ciway sapah pyasan kska alang, duri ni, thjilan kingal alang kana ka gisu kghak mniq kneinu na Atayal, saw nii pslian mrahul ga kari Atayal o "Tu-nan" ksun. Kiya ni manu ka Tanah Tunux o bqanan dha suyang bhangan "Pay-ran" da.Kiya ka kiya ni tnealang o bqanan dha hnang "Pas-qu-nan" (paskwalan), bukuy kwan-fu do djyan dhuq sayang ka Pay-ran ksun. Kklaan rrigaw pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang. Pnyahan bnatas Qtaan bnatas
S.PHON: = …ĺ'ujan = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč …ĺ'ujan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, bunun*%, sajsijat*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč paj-…ĺan(…ĺ'ujan) tńßujaŇč alaŇč pns…ôanak alaŇč: " …ĺjaw-wu-j…ôn" m…ĺi…ĺińß saw …ôgu qnp…ĺiŇčan …ĺqnux. nniqan alaŇč nniqan sin- ¶u-s…ôn wu-*uŇč-sjaŇč taw-san- ¶un. klbaŇčan llbaŇčan ga daja ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn, igi sijaw daja saŇč-piŇč-si, ga ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw wu- ¶w…ô-san. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj nniqan lliŇčaj dxgal sttuan, knba…ĺaw ****-****m. kklaan ppanan pgkla ppanan …ĺulu. mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: tduwa muda s…ôŇč-taw ***(nan- ¶iŇč kuŇč-…ĺu), paańß ¶u-tuŇč mkala dgijaq mtmaj wu-*uŇč, muuda maw-pu doniqan kiŇčal wajaj …ôlug mqu…ĺi …ôlug ppanan pn…ôgalaŇč paj-…ĺan, mtmaj do dńßuq paj-…ĺan da. ida tduwa mniq b…ĺańß mmowsa alaŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn siida niqan t…ĺu …ôlug wajaj, mqu…ĺi…ôlug paj-…ĺan do dńßuq da. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn ¶ mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu. nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ska…ĺi ka…ĺi:ka…ĺi atajal, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijaan snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pnjańßan alaŇč ka…ĺi atajal ga …ĺjaw-wu-j…ôn ksun o " …ôgu qnp…ĺiŇčan …ĺqnux".babaw klwaan tanańß tunux do, k…ôsa ¶u tanańß tunux ga, pńßijug sapańß ptasan ni ¶iwaj sapańß pjasan kska alaŇč, du…ĺi ni, tńß…üilan kiŇčal alaŇč kana ka gisu kgńßak mniq kn…ôinu na atajal, saw nii pslian m…ĺańßul ga ka…ĺi atajal o "tu-nan" ksun. kija ni manu ka tanańß tunux o bqanan dńßa sujaŇč bńßaŇčan "paj-…ĺan" da.kija ka kija ni tn…ôalaŇč o bqanan dńßa ńßnaŇč "pas-qu-nan" (paskwalan), bukuj kwan-*u do d…üjan dńßuq sajaŇč ka paj-…ĺan ksun. kklaan …ĺ…ĺigaw pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč. pnjańßan bnatas qtaan bnatas
